subcodes.first_line: O kind friends! Though outwardly ye are occupied in that field with sowing and watering and reaping, yet in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان هر چند بظاهر در آنکشتزار بکاشتن و آبیاری و حصاد مشغولید ولی فی
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @work as worship, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
